/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libros2_total_demo__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libros2_total_demo__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/ros2_total_demo__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/ros2_total_demo/msg/detail/object_pose__type_support.c.o   -L/usr/local/cuda-11.4/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-11.4/lib64:/home/rm/ros2_ws/src/ros2_total_demo/build/ros2_total_demo:/opt/ros/foxy/lib: libros2_total_demo__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
